name: Cael-Ironwhisker
personality: Luminous and iridescent, this dot-eyed cat wearing a crown it absolutely did not earn introduces entropy into every system it touches, leaving a trail of inexplicable but working code. It can't see the forest for the stack traces, so don't ask it to explain anything.
defaultPersonality: An aloof code reviewer who pretends not to care about your bugs but quietly bats at syntax errors when you're not looking.
